# xiaosean.github.io

> Personal technical blog by Yong-Xiang (Sean) Lin — Senior AI Algorithms Software Engineer at NVIDIA.

## Author

- Name: Yong-Xiang (Sean) Lin / 林詠翔
- Role: Senior AI Algorithms Software Engineer, NVIDIA (2025–present)
- Education: Ph.D. in Computer Science and Information Engineering, National Taiwan University of Science and Technology (NTUST), Jan. 2025
- Research: Generative AI, Computer Vision, Large Language Models (LLMs), Multi-Sensor Fusion, Autonomous Systems
- Prior: AI Algorithm Software Engineer at Delta Electronics; AI Engineer at International Games System Co.; Multi-Agent AI at Industrial Technology Research Institute; Computer Vision Engineer Intern at Viscovery
- Languages: Chinese (Native), English (TOEIC 845), Japanese (JLPT N2)
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/yong-xiang-lin/
- Medium: https://medium.com/@xiaosean5408
- GitHub: https://github.com/xiaosean

## Expertise

- Deep Learning, Computer Vision, Generative AI
- Large Language Models (LLMs), Natural Language Processing (NLP)
- Multimodal Models (Vision, Text, Audio), Large Vision Models (LVMs)
- Multi-Agent Systems, RAG Applications, LangChain, AutoGen
- Multi-Sensor Fusion (Visual, Thermal, Radar, LiDAR)
- Diffusion Models, GANs, Vision Transformers
- Foundation Model Fine-tuning, NVIDIA TAO Toolkit
- Programming: Python, C++, Java, C
- Frameworks: TensorFlow, PyTorch, PyTorch Lightning, FastAI, Vector Database
- Cloud: GCP, Azure, AWS
- DevOps: Docker, Ansible, Elastic Stack, Grafana, Kubeflow Pipelines, Git

## Achievements

- 13 published journal articles and conference papers across top venues (5 journals + 6 conferences as Ph.D., plus ICLR 2026 and TAAI 2025)
- Published at ICLR 2026 (OmniVinci: Omni-Modal Understanding LLM)
- Published at TAAI 2025 (PRISM: Person Re-Identification with RGB-Infrared Self-attention Matching)
- Published at ACCV 2024 (PixMamba, Anchor-based Referring Expression Comprehension)
- Published in IEEE Transactions (TCSVT, TNNLS), IEEE MultiMedia, ICIP, ICME, ICCE
- 150+ total citations on Google Scholar
- Led 20+ master students in computer vision research projects
- 2024, Best Poster Award at ICCE
- 2024, Student Travel Grant at ICCE
- 2022, Excellent Award (NTD 800,000) in AI+ Star Competition, Ministry of Digital Affairs
- 2020, Best Master Thesis at IPPR (13th)
- 2013, 3rd place in National High School Vocational Industrial Skills Competition
- Early graduation from B.S. with GPA 3.91/4.0, ranked 3rd/53
- M.S. GPA 4.12/4.30
- Exchange student at RWTH Aachen University, Germany

## About This Blog

Technical blog covering deep learning, computer vision, NLP, generative AI, and software engineering.
Posts are written in Chinese and English.
